### Changed
- Decouple custom branding from the gs-backend plugin so branding assets are served by a dedicated backend plugin and work without `gs:` config.
See [./docs/releases/v0.124.2-changelog.md](https://github.com/giantswarm/backstage/blob/main/docs/releases/v0.124.2-changelog.md) for more information.
